fa-00.appearanceId: two digit numeral zeros side by side

fa-100.intentId: mark something as complete or perfect

fa-align-center.appearanceId: three horizontal lines of varying length centered symmetrically
fa-align-center.intentId: horizontally center text in a block

fa-align-justify.appearanceId: four horizontal lines of equal full length stacked
fa-align-justify.intentId: stretch text to fill full line width

fa-align-left.appearanceId: three horizontal lines of varying length aligned to left edge
fa-align-left.intentId: align text to the left margin

fa-align-right.appearanceId: three horizontal lines of varying length aligned to right edge
fa-align-right.intentId: align text to the right margin

fa-ambulance.appearanceId: boxy vehicle with cross symbol on side and emergency light on top

fa-anchor.appearanceId: nautical anchor with ring at top and horizontal cross arm
fa-anchor.functionalityId: pin or fix element in place
fa-anchor.intentId: mark a fixed or permanent reference point

fa-anchor-circle-check.appearanceId: nautical anchor with checkmark badge circle in corner
fa-anchor-circle-check.functionalityId: confirm anchor or fixed point is valid
fa-anchor-circle-check.intentId: verify a pinned item is approved

fa-anchor-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: nautical anchor with exclamation badge circle in corner
fa-anchor-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: flag anchor or fixed point with warning
fa-anchor-circle-exclamation.intentId: alert user to an issue with a pinned item

fa-anchor-circle-xmark.appearanceId: nautical anchor with X badge circle in corner
fa-anchor-circle-xmark.intentId: delete or reject a pinned reference

fa-anchor-lock.appearanceId: nautical anchor with padlock badge overlay
fa-anchor-lock.functionalityId: lock a pinned or fixed element
fa-anchor-lock.intentId: secure a fixed reference from changes

fa-apple-alt.appearanceId: whole apple silhouette with leaf and stem at top

fa-apple-core.appearanceId: apple core with stem and seeds visible after eating
fa-apple-core.functionalityId: mark item as consumed or depleted
fa-apple-core.intentId: indicate something has been used up

fa-apple-crate.appearanceId: wooden slatted crate filled with apples
fa-apple-crate.intentId: manage or order a large batch of items

fa-area-chart.appearanceId: filled shaded area below a rising and falling line graph
fa-area-chart.functionalityId: view area chart or trend data

fa-arrow-circle-down.intentId: move or retrieve content going down

fa-arrow-circle-left.intentId: go back or shift content to the left

fa-arrow-circle-right.intentId: advance forward or shift content right

fa-arrow-circle-up.intentId: move or send content going up

fa-arrow-down.appearanceId: single downward-pointing arrow with stem and arrowhead

fa-arrow-down-1-9.appearanceId: downward arrow with small numeral 1 above numeral 9
fa-arrow-down-1-9.functionalityId: sort list in ascending numeric order
fa-arrow-down-1-9.intentId: order items from lowest to highest number

fa-arrow-down-9-1.appearanceId: downward arrow with small numeral 9 above numeral 1
fa-arrow-down-9-1.functionalityId: sort list in descending numeric order
fa-arrow-down-9-1.intentId: order items from highest to lowest number

fa-arrow-down-a-z.appearanceId: downward arrow with small letter A above letter Z
fa-arrow-down-a-z.functionalityId: sort list in ascending alphabetical order
fa-arrow-down-a-z.intentId: order items from A to Z

fa-arrow-down-from-arc.appearanceId: downward arrow descending from a curved arc at top
fa-arrow-down-from-arc.functionalityId: download or pull content from a curved path
fa-arrow-down-from-arc.intentId: retrieve content flowing down from above

fa-arrow-down-from-bracket.appearanceId: downward arrow descending out of an open bracket at top
fa-arrow-down-from-bracket.functionalityId: export or pull content down from a container
fa-arrow-down-from-bracket.intentId: extract content downward from a bounded area

fa-arrow-down-from-dotted-line.appearanceId: downward arrow descending from a horizontal dotted line above
fa-arrow-down-from-dotted-line.functionalityId: move content below a threshold line
fa-arrow-down-from-dotted-line.intentId: bring an item down past a defined boundary

fa-arrow-down-left.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing down and to the left

fa-arrow-down-left-and-arrow-up-right-to.appearanceId: two opposing diagonal arrows pointing inward toward center from upper-right and lower-left
fa-arrow-down-left-and-arrow-up-right-to.functionalityId: compress or collapse content to center
fa-arrow-down-left-and-arrow-up-right-to.intentId: minimize or shrink a view to fit

fa-arrow-down-long.appearanceId: long single downward-pointing arrow with extended stem
fa-arrow-down-long.functionalityId: scroll far down or indicate long downward distance

fa-arrow-down-right.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing down and to the right

fa-arrow-down-to-arc.appearanceId: downward arrow pointing into a curved arc at bottom
fa-arrow-down-to-arc.functionalityId: send or deposit content into a curved target
fa-arrow-down-to-arc.intentId: deliver content into a receiving curved path

fa-arrow-down-to-bracket.appearanceId: downward arrow pointing into an open bracket at bottom
fa-arrow-down-to-bracket.functionalityId: save or drop content into a container
fa-arrow-down-to-bracket.intentId: store or deposit an item into a bounded area

fa-arrow-down-to-dotted-line.appearanceId: downward arrow pointing toward a horizontal dotted line below
fa-arrow-down-to-dotted-line.functionalityId: move content down to a boundary line
fa-arrow-down-to-dotted-line.intentId: position an item at a defined lower threshold

fa-arrow-down-to-square.appearanceId: downward arrow pointing into an open square at bottom
fa-arrow-down-to-square.functionalityId: download or insert content into a box
fa-arrow-down-to-square.intentId: place or save an item into a framed area

fa-arrow-down-up-across-line.appearanceId: two arrows pointing down and up on either side of a horizontal line
fa-arrow-down-up-across-line.functionalityId: swap or toggle items across a dividing line
fa-arrow-down-up-across-line.intentId: exchange positions of elements across a boundary

fa-arrow-down-up-lock.appearanceId: two arrows pointing down and up with a padlock between them
fa-arrow-down-up-lock.functionalityId: lock vertical sort order in place
fa-arrow-down-up-lock.intentId: prevent reordering of vertically arranged items
